vibe: Modern & Vibrant, Professional, High-End Manufacturing, Trustworthy

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-semibold

surfaces.header: Crystal Glass - backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-black/5
surfaces.cards: bg-white border border-black/10 hover:shadow-2xl transition-all duration-300

pages.name: Home
sections: Hero (Left text, right image, bold abstract background)
Marquee (Precision in Every Print • Roll Form Sticker Labels • Foil Stamping • UV Finishing)
About Teaser (Split layout, large numbers: 1,00,000 sq. meters/month)
Industries We Serve (Image cards with hover zoom)

pages.name: About Us
sections: Hero Header (Dark overlay with machinery background)

pages.name: Services/Capabilities
sections: Detailed Capabilities List (Self-adhesive, Custom die-cut, Foil stamping, UV, lamination)

pages.name: Industries We Serve
sections: Industry specific use-cases Grid (Pharma, FMCG, Cosmetics, F&B, Pesticides)

pages.name: Gallery/Portfolio
sections: Masonry or Grid layout of Label Samples

pages.name: Contact Us
sections: Quote/Inquiry Request Form (Sharp edges, clear inputs)

components.buttons: bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm hover:bg-black transition-colors duration-300 border border-transparent hover:border-black
components.forms: Shadcn UI Input/Textarea heavily styled: bg-[#F8F9FA] border-black/10 focus:border-[#0A0A0A] rounded-none h-14
components.marquee: react-fast-marquee with large outline text for 'Precision in Every Print'

motion.animations: framer-motion for fade-up on scroll, staggering children elements

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the website using React Router for navigating between pages: Home, About Us, Services/Capabilities, Industries We Serve, Gallery/Portfolio, Contact Us.
Install the following fonts via Google Fonts: Outfit (300, 400, 500, 600, 700) and Manrope (400, 500, 600).
Use framer-motion for all scroll reveals. Add staggered fade-ups for list items and bento grids.
Build forms using pure Tailwind CSS or customized Shadcn. Keep them brutalist (sharp edges, no border-radius, bold borders on focus).
Avoid generic shadow classes (`shadow-md`). Stick to flat, bold, modern aesthetics with sharp corners (`rounded-none`). If shadow is needed, use high-contrast drop-shadows.
Use the CMYK accents (`accent_cyan`, `accent_magenta`, `accent_yellow`) as subtle hover states, text highlights, underlines, or small decorative geometric blocks.
IMPORTANT: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) for testing purposes.
Never use placeholders for images. Always use the provided media URLs.
Ensure the hero background has a subtle dark/light overlay so the bold text remains readable. If using light background, use dark text.
